creator: micahjon@ywave.com
text:
Armin Pirkovitsch wrote:
> I'm sorry - it was my mistake - i was a little bit to fast with my
> conclusion - I've narrowed the problem to libgnome-2.16.0 down.
> Installed: Crash, Deinstalled: works...

Although it makes no sense, it does seem to work. If it doesn't fix the 
bug, it at least increases the number of saves before a crash.

I say it makes no sense because libgnome doesn't show up anywhere in 
Firefox's dependency tree. But a make deinstall from ports/x11/libgnome 
allows Firefox to save every image from www.freebsd.org/logo.html. Doing 
a make reinstall causes Firefox to die on the second image.

Uninstalling libgnome is hardly a viable fix as it will break several 
other ports....

Micah
